ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "time_point" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "ins_pwr" REAL /* Instantaneous power output (in watts) */,
  "j1" REAL /* Sensor reading J1 */,
  "j2" REAL /* Sensor reading J2 */,
  "j3" REAL /* Sensor reading J3 */,
  "j4" REAL /* Sensor reading J4 */,
  "j5" REAL /* Sensor reading J5 */,
  "j6" REAL /* Sensor reading J6 */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., power, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES energy_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy generation site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the site (in watts) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., power, environmental) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES energy_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role (foreign key referencing the roles table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site for which the threshold is set */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor for which the threshold is set */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert to be generated when the threshold is exceeded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site for which the metric is calculated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., efficiency) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "avg_value" REAL /* Average value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the metric calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES energy_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site generating the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded) */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES energy_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report template used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES report_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES energy_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site for which the model is generated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_data" TEXT /* Historical data used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_models_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES energy_sites ("site_id")
)
